instruction: Which accounts are managed by Barth Ronja? Return only the account names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

steps.result_preview:
cat accounts/README.MD
Put account records into files `ACCOUNT_ID.json`.

Example filename:

```text
acct_001.json
```
